title: [FIRRTL] Const Canonicalizer Issue
body:
Doing another reduction, I hit a different const-related canonicalizer issue:

``` mlir
firrtl.circuit "Foo" {
  firrtl.module private @Bar() {
    %c0_ui1 = firrtl.constant 0 : !firrtl.uint<1>
    %c0_ui32 = firrtl.constant 0 : !firrtl.uint<32>
    %wire = firrtl.wire : !firrtl.uint<32>
    %c0_ui10 = firrtl.constant 0 : !firrtl.const.uint<10>
    %node = firrtl.node %c0_ui10 : !firrtl.const.uint<10>
    %node_0 = firrtl.node %c0_ui1 {name = "node"} : !firrtl.uint<1>
    %0 = firrtl.mux(%node_0, %node, %c0_ui32) : (!firrtl.uint<1>, !firrtl.const.uint<10>, !firrtl.uint<32>) -> !firrtl.uint<32>
    firrtl.matchingconnect %wire, %0 : !firrtl.uint<32>
  }
  firrtl.extmodule @Foo()
}
```

``` console
# circt-opt -canonicalize Foo.mlir          
Foo.mlir:9:10: error: 'firrtl.pad' op inferred type(s) '!firrtl.const.uint<32>' are incompatible with return type(s) of operation '!firrtl.uint<32>'
    %0 = firrtl.mux(%node_0, %node, %c0_ui32) : (!firrtl.uint<1>, !firrtl.const.uint<10>, !firrtl.uint<32>) -> !firrtl.uint<32>
         ^
Foo.mlir:9:10: error: 'firrtl.pad' op failed to infer returned types
    %0 = firrtl.mux(%node_0, %node, %c0_ui32) : (!firrtl.uint<1>, !firrtl.const.uint<10>, !firrtl.uint<32>) -> !firrtl.uint<32>
         ^
Foo.mlir:9:10: note: see current operation: %6 = "firrtl.pad"(%4) <{amount = 32 : i32}> : (!firrtl.const.uint<10>) -> !firrtl.uint<32>
```
